description: CustodyComms Update Manifest - Controls forced updates and version requirements

forceUpdate.message: Critical security update required. This version can no longer connect to CustodyComms services.

highlights: Incident details and sharing - Richer incident views with the ability to share individual incidents with your attorney securely. Version history keeps everyone in sync. Free for all users.
CustodyComms for iOS - View shared incidents on your iPhone. Free on the App Store.
Share with anyone - Share with people who haven't signed up yet. They'll get access automatically when they join.
TalkingParents support - Import your TalkingParents messages directly into CustodyComms
OurFamilyWizard improvements - Better parsing for edge cases and non-standard export formats
Stay in the loop - Get timely updates, promotions, and important information right inside the app
Help Chat - Ask questions and get instant answers from the help manual, powered by AI
Smoother and more reliable - Faster sign-in, lower memory usage, and improved dark mode and accessibility
Share incidents with your attorney - Send individual incident details securely, with version history so everyone stays in sync. Free for all users.
CustodyComms for iOS - View shared incidents on your iPhone. Free on the App Store.
TalkingParents support - Import your TalkingParents messages directly into CustodyComms
Faster and more reliable - Quicker startup, lower memory usage, and graceful recovery
Accessibility improvements - Better contrast, keyboard navigation, and screen reader support
Dark mode polish - Login, signup, and all screens now look great in dark mode
Stronger security - Refreshed all security credentials and hardened the app end-to-end
Security remediation — 18 fixes across CRITICAL, HIGH, and MEDIUM findings
TalkingParents plugin — Full support for TalkingParents message imports
CCM sharing hardening — Encrypted cross-platform case sharing
Firebase Security Rules update — Tighter access controls
Fixed Forensic exports — Appendix D (Message Table) now works correctly in multi-exhibit exports
Smoother export experience — Export settings reset properly between sessions
Dark Mode polish — FRE 902(14) certification section styled for dark mode
Enhanced security — Comprehensive security hardening across the application
Fixed import issue — Drag-and-drop and file selection now work reliably
Cleaner PDF exports — Reduced spacing between messages for more compact, readable evidence packages
Faster demo refresh — Old cached screenshots are automatically cleared when demo data updates
Stability improvements — Various bug fixes and performance optimizations
Dark Mode is here — Choose Light, Dark, or match your system settings automatically
Android SMS support — Import XML backups from SMS Backup & Restore
Stronger Evidence Protection — Pre-export verification ensures source files haven't been modified
Sign your affidavit electronically — FRE 902(14) certification directly in the app
Redesigned Help Center — Interactive Quick Start Guide with progress tracking
Easier multi-file imports — Clear popup when dropping multiple files
Premium polish — Smooth animations, ripple effects, and a more responsive feel
Initial release
Import SMS, email, and messaging app data
Generate evidence-ready PDF exhibits
AI-powered sentiment analysis
